svg.title: HyperWeave Badge Genome Wall of Proof
svg.desc: Three counter-scrolling rows of compositor-generated HyperWeave badges showing 33 badge variants across AI ecosystem, infrastructure, and social proof signals.

hw:provenance.hw:generator: HyperWeave Compositor v0.3.10 plus Codex marquee assembler (InnerAura Labs)

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Present the README wall of proof as 33 real compositor-generated badge variants rather than hand-drawn approximations.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Generated each badge through the HyperWeave CLI, stripped badge-level document metadata and font payloads, resolved runtime DNA variables into concrete paints, hoisted glyphs into shared symbols, and duplicated three row trains for seamless counter-scroll.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Per-badge compositor geometry was preserved over aggressive redraw-based compression; embedded font binaries were removed to keep the showcase under the README size target, so host font fallback may differ slightly from standalone badge exports.

hw:artifact.hw:spatial-notes: ViewBox 800x86. Rows at y=8,34,60 contain compositor badge widths with 18px inter-badge pitch gap. Train widths are 1491.0, 1520.0, and 1383.0px, each duplicated once for seamless looping behind 80px edge fades.
